members.name: Dangote Group of company
members.description: The Dangote Group is a Nigerian multinational industrial conglomerate founded by Aliko Dangote. It is the largest conglomerate in West Africa and one of the largest on the African continent. The company operates in various sectors, including cement production, sugar refining, flour milling, salt processing, and more. The Dangote Group has a significant presence in Nigeria and other African countries, contributing to economic growth and development in the region.

members.name: MTN
members.description: MTN is a Nigerian multinational telecommunications company. It is one of the largest mobile network operators in Africa, providing services across multiple countries.

members.name: Access Bank
members.description: Access Bank is a Nigerian commercial bank with a significant presence in the country and other African nations. It offers a wide range of financial services to individuals and businesses.
